'''Gorvan Peel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Nebula Flight]]. In the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]], during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Peel flew as [[Nebula Eleven]]. His fighter was destroyed, but he ejected and was apparently rescued by [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces.<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}
